formats.format: $timestamp$ AkamaiDNS streamId=$quoted_string{name=stream_id}$ cliIP=$quoted_string{name=client_ip}$ resolverIP=$quoted_string{name=resolver_ip}$ domain=$quoted_string{name=domain}$ recordType=$quoted_string{name=record_type}$ responseCode=$quoted_string{name=response_code}$ answer=$quoted_string{name=answer}$ edge=$quoted_string{name=edge_server}$ ttl=$field_value{name=ttl}$ bytes=$field_value{name=bytes}$

analysis.semantic_summary: This parser processes Akamai DNS query logs, capturing DNS resolution activities including client queries, responses, and associated metadata. It standardizes DNS security events for monitoring domain resolution patterns, potential DNS-based threats, and network activity analysis.

factors: Multiple regex patterns for field matching

optimization_opportunities: Add validation for IP address formats
Implement error handling for malformed logs
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: akamai_dns-latest 
-- OCSF Class: DNS Activity (4003)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:13:19.787868

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local patterns = {
    ip = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$",
    response_codes = {
        NOERROR = 1,
        NXDOMAIN = 2,
        SERVFAIL = 2,
        FORMERR = 2,
        REFUSED = 2
    }
}

-- Local helper functions
local function validate_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return false end
    return string.match(ip, patterns.ip) ~= nil
end

local function get_status_id(code)
    return patterns.response_codes[code] or 2
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local variables
    local output = {
        -- Core OCSF fields
        class_uid = 4003,
        class_name = "DNS Activity", 
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        type_uid = 400301,
        activity_id = 1,
        activity_name = "DNS Query",
        
        -- Initialize nested tables
        src_endpoint = {},
        dst_endpoint = {},
        query = {},
        response = {},
        answers = {},
        metadata = {},
        observables = {}
    }

    -- Efficient field transformations using local variables
    local time = record.timestamp
    if time then
        output.time = time
    end

    local client_ip = record.client_ip
    if client_ip and validate_ip(client_ip) then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = client_ip
    end

    local resolver_ip = record.resolver_ip  
    if resolver_ip and validate_ip(resolver_ip) then
        output.dst_endpoint.ip = resolver_ip
    end

    local domain = record.domain
    if domain then
        output.query.hostname = domain
        -- Add observable
        output.observables[1] = {
            name = "query_hostname",
            type = "Hostname", 
            value = domain
        }
    end

    local record_type = record.record_type
    if record_type then
        output.query.type = record_type
    end

    local response_code = record.response_code
    if response_code then
        output.response.code = response_code
        output.status_id = get_status_id(response_code)
        output.severity_id = output.status_id
    end

    local answer = record.answer
    if answer then
        output.answers.address = answer
    end

    local ttl = record.ttl
    if ttl then
        output.answers.ttl = tonumber(ttl)
    end

    local bytes = record.bytes
    if bytes then
        output.response.length = tonumber(bytes)
    end

    local edge = record.edge_server
    if edge then
        output.metadata.log_name = edge
    end

    local stream_id = record.stream_id
    if stream_id then
        output.metadata.correlation_uid = stream_id
    end

    -- Validation and cleanup
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    if not output.status_id then
        output.status_id = 2 -- Default to error
    end

    return output
end

setup_steps: Deploy LUA module to approved directory

monitoring_recommendations: Alert on invalid IP address patterns
